title: A Fresh Feeling
description: A new taste of vanilla+ made delicately by someone with too much time on their hands!
body:
This is a modpack made while looking for vanilla+ packs but i couldnt find any that i really liked or they added too much so this pack aims to be a perfect blend of vanilla+ and not too much content but just enough to not be boring if that makes sense 

this pack adds new structures by yung, more unique weapons from Minecraft Dungeons,the Barebones and Fresh animations texturepack as well as many more mods that you will just have to play and experiance!
